title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nvme-cli bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nvme-cli is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The nvme-cli packages provide the Non-volatile Memory Express (NVMe) command-line interface to manage and configure NVMe controllers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.7: nvme-cli JSON output change for 'list' in 2.11+ breaks automation [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121216)

full_text:
An update for nvme-cli is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The nvme-cli packages provide the Non-volatile Memory Express (NVMe) command-line interface to manage and configure NVMe controllers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RHEL9.7: nvme-cli JSON output change for 'list' in 2.11+ breaks automation [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121216)
